ddls:
CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Case identifier for the purchase order */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that created the purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier associated with the purchase order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the purchase order (e.g., Draft, Approved, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the purchase order was created */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the purchase order */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the purchase order was approved */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget allocated for the purchase order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Address where the order should be delivered */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit, Check) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the purchase order (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the purchase order */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_items_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order the activity is related to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Create, Modify, Approve) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the activity (e.g., changed quantity, updated price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Purchaser, Approver, Admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's supervisor */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget allocated to the department */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Supplier rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the budget is allocated to */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Total budget amount allocated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of budget allocation (e.g., Allocated, Released, Frozen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order being approved */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the purchase order */,
  "approval_level" INTEGER /* Approval level (e.g., 1 for initial approval, 2 for final approval) */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the approval was given */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made during the approval process */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity type (e.g., Purchase Order, Supplier, Product) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_performance" (
  "supplier_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier performance record */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier being evaluated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Overall rating of the supplier */,
  "on_time_delivery" TEXT /* Supplier's on-time delivery performance */,
  "quality_of_goods" TEXT /* Supplier's quality of goods performance */,
  "communication" TEXT /* Supplier's communication performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_performance_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "po_status_history" (
  "po_status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history record */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made during the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_po_status_history_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)
